global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with game-related elements and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to win rewards and play with friends.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.description: A smaller central element with a light purple background and a single outlined circle, indicating a game feature.

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The title 'IronQuest' displayed prominently at the top in bold, white text against a purple background.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Win epic rewards Play with friends tonight' in large, white font, centered in the middle of the ad.
